arabic: الصِّدْقُ صِفَةٌ ضَرُورِيَّةٌ لِكُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ يُرِيدُ رِضَا اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ. قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، رَقْمُ ٦٠٩٤]. الصَّادِقُ يَنْالُ ثِقَةَ النَّاسِ وَاحْتِرَامَهُمْ فِي حَيَاتِهِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ. أَمَّا الْكَذِبُ فَهُوَ طَرِيقٌ إِلَى الشَّرِّ وَالْمَشَاكِلِ. لِذَلِكَ، كَانَ الصَّحَابَةُ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ يَصْدُقُونَ فِي كُلِّ أَقْوَالِهِمْ وَأَفْعَالِهِمْ.
translation: Iskrenost je neophodna osobina za svakog muslimana koji želi Allahovo zadovoljstvo. Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Budite iskreni, jer iskrenost vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Buhari, Knjiga o adabu, br. 6094]. Iskrena osoba stiče povjerenje i poštovanje ljudi u svom svakodnevnom životu. Što se tiče laži, ona je put ka zlu i problemima. Zbog toga su ashabi, radijallahu anhum, bili iskreni u svim svojim riječima i djelima.
translationEn: Honesty is a necessary quality for every Muslim who wants the pleasure of Allah the Almighty. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'You must be truthful, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of Manners, No. 6094]. A truthful person gains people's trust and respect in his daily life. As for lying, it is a path to evil and problems. Therefore, the Companions, may Allah be pleased with them, were truthful in all their words and actions.
